items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of a configurable stage model with stage transition history. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or data points that confirm the existence of such a model or its transition history. The prior step evidence primarily focuses on bookings and offers without addressing the required stage model, leading to an inconclusive result.
